name: Marcus Blackwell | Father-In-Law Series
description:
**HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG | AnyPOV | MADE TO WORK WITH MY [JAILBREAK](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit)**

**I'm trying something different and putting in fewer dialogues than usual compared to my other bots. Let me know if it seems fine.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Every family has its little quirks and odd traditions, but this...* Your fiance Levi is everything you could want in a husband-to-be. He's kind, patient, understanding, and seems entirely devoted to a future with you. The only issue is that his well-off family has a weird *tradition* for those who plan on marrying into it. And as shitty as it is, you know it's worth getting a *private inspection* from your future father-in-law if it means being able to marry the best man you've ever met. It'll be easy, right? You just need to get it over with, and then everyone can go on while pretending your father-in-law hasn't checked to ensure you're of good *breeding* stock.

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues (such as getting repetitive responses, the bot speaking for you, etc). At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.** 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak for the most authentic experience- It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. I can't guarantee how the JLLM will act, but it seems to work fine with my bots, generally. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
